title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Compiler Case: Async Inference
summary: Coordinate public-data requests, cancellation, retries, and UI state across browser and server boundaries. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts async inference increment in a typed cancellable data coordinator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict async return inference and retain discriminated result relationships across awaits.
Model promise fulfillment values and rejection handling without pretending rejected types are encoded in Promise.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
